title: so + adj./adv. + that / such + N + that（結果子句）

formulas.formula: so + adj./adv. + that + 結果子句
formulas.zh: 如此...以至於...；表示因為某程度很高而導致某結果

formulas.formula: such + (a/an) + adj. + N + that + 結果子句
formulas.zh: 如此...的...以至於...；通過修飾名詞來表達結果

explanation: 此句型用於表達因為某事物的程度很高而導致的結果。so 後接形容詞或副詞，such 後接名詞片語（由形容詞和名詞組成）。兩者皆可互換改寫，但要注意詞性搭配：形容詞/副詞用 so，名詞片語用 such。that 引導的結果子句通常使用過去簡單式或現在簡單式。該句型在描述因果關係時特別有力，常見於書面英語。

examples.eng: The movie was so interesting that everyone stayed until the end.
examples.chi: 那部電影非常有趣，以至於每個人都看到了最後。

examples.eng: She spoke so quickly that nobody could understand what she said.
examples.chi: 她說話非常快，以至於沒人能聽懂她在說什麼。

examples.eng: It was such a difficult exam that many students failed.
examples.chi: 那是一場如此困難的考試，以至於許多學生不及格。

examples.eng: He made such a terrible mistake that he lost his job.
examples.chi: 他犯了這樣一個可怕的錯誤，以至於失去了工作。

extension.tip: 判斷使用 so 或 such 的關鍵：so 直接修飾形容詞或副詞（so + adj./adv.），such 修飾名詞片語（such + a/an + adj. + N）。注意：a/an 的使用取決於名詞首字音素（如 a difficult exam，an impressive result）。不可混淆詞性，否則句子結構錯誤。

examples.test: ❌ It was so a beautiful day that we went to the beach.
examples.result: → ✓ It was such a beautiful day that we went to the beach.（直接修飾名詞片語應用 such）

examples.test: ❌ He ran such fast that he won the race.
examples.result: → ✓ He ran so fast that he won the race.（修飾副詞應用 so，不需 a/an）

examples.test: ✓ The weather was so nice that everyone smiled. / Such nice weather made everyone smile.
examples.result: → 兩句都正確，第一句用 so + adj. + that，第二句改為 such 的名詞片語主語形式

extension.note: 記住：so 配形容詞/副詞，such 配名詞片語（含形容詞修飾）；that 後接結果，通常是可以預測的後果。

parts: that most students didn't finish it in time.
exercises.sentence: The test was so difficult that most students didn't finish it in time.
exercises.translation: 那場測驗非常困難，以至於大多數學生沒有及時完成。

parts: that she couldn't believe it was real.
exercises.sentence: She received such a wonderful surprise that she couldn't believe it was real.
exercises.translation: 她收到了如此美妙的驚喜，以至於她無法相信那是真實的。

parts: that the neighbors complained about the noise.
exercises.sentence: The music played so loudly that the neighbors complained about the noise.
exercises.translation: 音樂播放得非常大聲，以至於鄰居抱怨了噪音。

parts: that we decided to cancel the outdoor event.
exercises.sentence: It was such heavy rain that we decided to cancel the outdoor event.
exercises.translation: 雨下得如此之大，以至於我們決定取消戶外活動。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的結果句型完成句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The weather was _______ that the picnic had to be cancelled.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「so bad」。此處 bad 是形容詞，修飾 weather（名詞），應用 so + 形容詞。B 項「such bad」錯誤，such 後需接名詞片語（形容詞+名詞），不能直接接形容詞。C 項「so badly」為副詞，不適合修飾名詞 weather。D 項「such a bad」雖文法上可用，但此處缺少名詞，不完整。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的結果句型，表達重物導致的後果。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The box was _______ heavy that he couldn't lift it by himself.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「so」。此處需要 so + 形容詞（heavy）+ that 結構。A 項「such」後需接名詞片語，不能直接接形容詞。C 項「very」無法引導結果子句。D 項「too much」詞性錯誤且不能引導 that 子句。只有 so 能正確搭配形容詞並引導結果意義。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的結果句型，表達有趣的故事導致結果。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It was _______ interesting story that everyone in the class wanted to hear the ending.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「such an」。此處需要 such + 不定冠詞（an）+ 形容詞（interesting）+ 名詞（story）+ that 結構。A 項「so an」詞序錯誤，so 不搭配冠詞。C 項「so interesting」缺少名詞片語（story），只有形容詞。D 項「very」無法引導結果子句。只有 such 能引導含有名詞片語的結果句型。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的結果句型，表達講話速度快導致的理解困難。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She spoke _______ fast that we had to ask her to slow down and repeat.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「so」。此處 fast 是副詞修飾動詞 spoke，應用 so + 副詞 + that 結構。A 項「such」用於名詞片語，不適合副詞。C 項「such a」後接可數名詞，此處無名詞。D 項「very so」組合不當，two intensifiers 不能並用。副詞用 so，名詞片語用 such，此題為副詞情況。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這部電影如此有趣，以至於我看了兩遍。
translation_exercises.answer: The movie was so interesting that I watched it twice.
hints: 提示1：so 後接形容詞，that 引導結果子句，表示「如此...以至於...」
提示2：結果子句通常用過去簡單式或現在簡單式，注意時態一致

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 昨天的數學考試這麼難，結果全班都沒及格。
translation_exercises.answer: Yesterday's math exam was so difficult that the whole class failed.
key_points: that + 結果子句（全班都沒及格）
hints: 提示1：用 so + 形容詞來表達考試的難度，該難度導致了失敗的結果
提示2：注意 'the whole class' 是集合名詞，搭配 failed（單數或複數皆可）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她講話的速度這麼快，以至於我根本聽不懂她在說什麼。
translation_exercises.answer: She spoke so quickly that I couldn't understand what she was saying. / She spoke so fast that I couldn't understand a word she said.
hints: 提示1：講話速度快要用副詞修飾動詞 spoke，so + 副詞是此句型的關鍵
提示2：結果子句用 couldn't (could not)，表示無法理解的負面結果

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他寫了一篇如此優美的文章，使得他在全國比賽中獲得了第一名。
translation_exercises.answer: He wrote such a beautiful essay that he won first place in the national competition. / He wrote such a well-written essay that he won first prize at the national contest.
key_points: such + a/an + beautiful (形容詞) + essay (名詞)
that + 結果子句（won first place）
名詞片語結構搭配 such
hints: 提示1：因為中心詞是名詞 essay，所以用 such + a/an + 形容詞 + 名詞，不能用 so
提示2：易誤用 'so beautiful essay'，但名詞前必須用 such；注意 a/an 的使用（a beautiful essay）
